title: bernardia axillaris var. genuina
intro: Bernardia axillaris var. genuina, also known as the Yellowroot or American Yellowroot, is a plant species that belongs to the Euphorbiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Bernardia axillaris var. genuina include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate digestive problems. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
